Harnesses

Subpage of Agentic Coding

Agents, feedback loops, and implementation habits.

A harness is a tool that keeps the agent working, even after a failure.

Harness Engineering is about building the scaffolding around agents so they can work safely and effectively beyond a single local chat session.
